candidate.objective: Experienced Civil Operator and All Rounder with a demonstrated history across major and minor bulk earthworks, civil construction, and HDPE pipeline installation. Adam has held operational roles with leading contractors including Aussie Civil & Mining Resources, MPC Kinetics, and Suffcon, and brings a strong foundation in load and haul operations, civil asset maintenance, and site preparation. Holds a Certificate III in Civil Construction Plant Operations and an HR Drivers Licence, with tickets covering Roller, Skid Steer, Loader, Dozer, Grader, Scraper, and Tractor operations.

duties: Undertook major and minor civil earthworks in support of HDPE pipeline installation projects.
Installed HDPE pipelines across a range of civil construction sites.
Conducted site preparation and reinstatement activities to project specifications.
Performed major and minor bulk earthworks across multiple project sites.
Conducted load and haul operations using heavy mobile plant.
Carried out civil asset maintenance and construction tasks.
Performed major and minor bulk earthworks in civil and mining environments.
Conducted load and haul operations using a range of heavy plant equipment.
Undertook civil asset maintenance and construction activities.
Operated haul trucks in an open pit mining environment.
Performed water cart operations across site.
Operated auxiliary equipment as required to support site activities.

skills.detail: Extensive experience in major and minor bulk earthworks, site preparation, and civil reinstatement across mining and construction environments.
Competent operator of Roller, Skid Steer, Loader, Dozer, Grader, Scraper, and Tractor. Experienced in load and haul operations and auxiliary plant.
Direct experience in civil earthworks for HDPE pipeline installation and site reinstatement associated with pipeline construction.
Strong commitment to workplace health and safety, with experience following JHA, SWMS, and pre-start processes across multiple site environments.

certifications.ticket: Certificate III in Civil Construction Plant Operations
certifications.details: Nationally recognised qualification in civil construction plant operations.
Heavy Rigid vehicle licence — Western Australia.
Certified to operate roller / compactor plant.
Certified to operate skid steer loader machinery.
Certified to operate front end loader plant.
Certified to operate motor grader plant.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
